Settings

Manage the provider and server settings that are active on this branch.

Additional settings surfaces stay in place for future work, but are hidden from the primary settings navigation until they are implemented.

Providers

Cloud providers and infrastructure connections

Active now: providers and servers. Reserved for later: General, Sites, Notifications, Security, API Keys.

Connect cloud providers to provision and manage servers.

No providers connected

Add a cloud provider to start provisioning servers.
